measures.name: Census Count Total
measures.description: Total midnight census count across all patient classes.

measures.name: Census Count Adults Total
measures.description: Total midnight census count for adult patients.

measures.name: Census Count Peds Total
measures.description: Total midnight census count for pediatric patients.

measures.name: User Defined Census Count
measures.dax: VAR _sel = SELECTEDVALUE('FilterAdultsPeds'[Selection], "(All)") RETURN SWITCH(_sel, "Adults", [Census Count Adults Total], "Peds", [Census Count Peds Total], [Census Count Total])
measures.description: Census count dynamically filtered by the Adults/Peds slicer. Defaults to All when no selection.

measures.name: Start Month Contains Partial Data?
measures.dax: VAR _minDate = MINX(ALLSELECTED('Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date]), 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date]) VAR _isPartial = DAY(_minDate) <> 1 RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_minDate), 0, IF(_isPartial, 1, 0))
measures.description: Returns 1 when the earliest month in the current filter context does not start on the 1st day (partial start month). Drives gray-highlight formatting.

measures.name: End Month Contains Partial Data?
measures.dax: VAR _maxDate = MAXX(ALLSELECTED('Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date]), 'Midnight_Census_Template'[Census Date]) VAR _lastDayOfMonth = EOMONTH(_maxDate, 0) VAR _isPartial = _maxDate <> _lastDayOfMonth RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_maxDate), 0, IF(_isPartial, 1, 0))
measures.description: Returns 1 when the latest month in the current filter context does not end on the last day of the month (partial end month). Drives gray-highlight formatting.

measures.name: Partial Months in View?
measures.dax: VAR _startPartial = [Start Month Contains Partial Data?] VAR _endPartial = [End Month Contains Partial Data?] RETURN IF(_startPartial = 1 || _endPartial = 1, "**Partial months are displayed in GRAY**", "")
measures.description: Returns a warning message string when any partial month appears in the current view.

measures.name: Last Refresh Date
measures.description: Static informational card text indicating refresh schedule.

calculatedColumns.name: Census Date_CY
calculatedColumns.description: Copy of Census Date used for prior-year or multi-axis comparison.
